narrative:
Monroe Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 793 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
